title: Got a Traffic Challan in Delhi NCR? Here's How to Legally Pay Less
excerpt: A Delhi traffic challan can cost thousands — but you don't have to pay the full amount. Here's how Lok Adalat settlement works and how to get a legal challan discount.

title: What Happens If You Don't Pay a Traffic Challan in India?
excerpt: Ignoring a traffic challan is one of the costliest mistakes a vehicle owner can make. Here's what actually happens — and how to fix it before it escalates.

title: Court Challan vs Online Challan — What's the Difference?
excerpt: Not all traffic challans are the same. Know the difference between an e-challan and a court challan — and what your legal options are for each.
